docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, WILLIAM D. DOES ONE THROUGH FIVE, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
